payload.notes: Second E15 story; stale replay must fail without automatic resolution and historical operation versions must remain replayable.
payload.title: Mutable Entity Revision Guards
payload.verify_command: cargo test -p harness-cli revision_guard && tests/docs/test-doc-contracts.sh && git diff --check

payload.evidence: Revision guards are enforced for mutable stories, decisions, backlog items, tools, and audit evidence; stale same-entity changesets return structured CONFLICT and roll back atomically. All 96 Rust tests and the complete pre-merge repository contract pass.

payload.actions_taken: ["Added schema-14 revisions and triggers; emitted guarded v3 mutable operations; rejected stale replay atomically; added Rust","native-protocol","rebuild","coherence","bootstrap","and documentation coverage; ran the full pre-merge contract."]
payload.decisions_made: ["Guard only mutable entity updates in operation version 3; keep append-only/stable inserts compatible; perform per-entity compare-and-swap inside the replay transaction; return deterministic conflict metadata without automatic conflict resolution."]
payload.errors: ["The first captured full-suite output exceeded the tool context","so the suite was rerun and observed through completion; no repository validation failed."]
payload.harness_friction: Bootstrap remains fail-closed because active backlog item 19 reports Symphony product work in the core owner database; implementation used the existing owner DB without suppressing that blocker.
payload.notes: Platform proof remains intentionally false locally; the PowerShell fixture was updated and is exercised by the existing five-platform CI matrix.
payload.task_summary: Implemented and verified mutable-entity revision guards for reproducible core-state replay.
